name: ruby-oj
title: ruby-oj
summary: fast JSON parser and serializer for Ruby
description:
fast JSON parser and serializer for Ruby
JSON (or JavaScript Object Notation) is a text-based open standard designed
for human-readable data interchange.
.
Oj (Optimized JSON) is a Ruby library written to provide speed optimized
handling of JSON, for parsing JSON and serializing objects.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use ruby-oj because fast JSON parser and serializer for Ruby.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use ruby-oj as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ruby-oj with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ruby-oj --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
